title: Xdi8Aho Mod
description:
A Minecraft mod designed for the Shidinn langage and Shidinn community.

Firefly, carry light,
In the night, blink his eye,
Just to make his future bright.
body:
> Firefly, carry light,
> 
> In the night, blink his eye,
> 
> Just to make his future bright.

# Xdi8Aho Mod
The Xdi8Aho mod is produced by the Shidinn Community. For information about the Shidinn Community, please visit [Xdi8Aho Wiki](https://wiki.xdi8.top/).

The Xdi8Aho mod adds support for displaying the letters of Xdi8Aho language (Shidinn language), adds fireflies and corresponding tinted glass bottles, Shidinnia composed of multiple layers of floating islands, the Xdi8Aho little house, and the indium tool series. It also features 45 symbol stones that can be obtained by using indium chisels to chisel out empty symbol stones.

The new mod version updates the mechanics for chiseling symbol stones and adds a list of enhancement blocks. The mod also includes a series of redwood blocks and redwood trees.

This mod supports Minecraft 1.21.4 with Fabric/NeoForge mod loaders and Minecraft 1.18.2 with Forge/Fabric mod loaders. [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) is required for mod version 2.0.0-beta1 or above. Fabric mod loader requires mod version 2.0.0-beta3 or above, and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is needed.

In Minecraft version 1.18.2, the [Sweet Potato](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sweet-potato) _([MCMOD](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2941.html))_ mod's sweet potato foods and function blocks were included in the Xdi8Aho mod. In Minecraft version 1.21.4 and above, the [Sweet Potato Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spmreborn) mod and the Xdi8Aho mod are linkage mods. When the two mods are loaded together, the loot table of the Xdi8Aho little house is even richer, and the work stations in Sweet Potato Reborn mod can also be used as a symbol stone enhancement block.

# Languages
The languages which the Xdi8Aho mod supports are English, Chinese Simplified, Chinese Traditional, Classical Chinese and Meme Chinese. Other languages have not been added to the game because the translation on Crowdin is not complete and checked. To help translate the mod, visit [our Crowdin project](https://crowdin.com/project/xdi8aho-mod) with 60 languages. We welcome everyone to contribute to the mod's translation.
